My /etc/make.conf contain:
CFLAGS= -O2 -msse2 -msse3 -mssse3 -msse4.1 -pipe 

Looks like O2 overwrites O3 and asserts does not remove.


Add to Makefile:
CFLAGS+=        -DNDEBUG
to remove all assert() code.
